name: The Hometown Savings Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank offering personal, business, and trust management services with multiple branches in Indiana and Illinois.
description_long: The Hometown Savings Bank (THSB) is a community-focused financial institution serving the Terre Haute, Indiana area and surrounding regions including Riley, Brazil, West Terre Haute, and Danville, Illinois. The bank maintains multiple banking centers across its primary market and emphasizes its commitment to local community involvement and support. THSB offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, business banking solutions, mortgage services, and trust and wealth management services. The bank provides online and mobile banking capabilities with features like mobile check deposit, 24/7 account access, and Zelle money transfer integration for peer-to-peer payments. THSB is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to regulatory limits. What distinguishes THSB is its emphasis on community banking and local presence, with branded messaging around "believing in the community" and maintaining physical branch locations rather than operating as a purely digital institution. The bank offers accessibility features including AudioEye toolbar integration for website accessibility and provides resources for security awareness and fraud protection. THSB is best suited for consumers and businesses in its geographic footprint seeking relationship-based banking with local branch access and personalized trust and wealth management services. The main limitation is geographic restriction to Indiana and Illinois markets, making the bank inaccessible to customers outside these service areas. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile banking app with mobile check deposit
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full government backing
Multiple physical branch locations for in-person banking (5 in Terre Haute area, plus 4 surrounding markets)
24/7 mobile banking with mobile check deposit capability
Zelle integration for fast peer-to-peer money transfers
Trust and wealth management services for estate and financial planning
Dedicated business banking division with customized account products
Website accessibility features including AudioEye toolbar for disabled users
Mortgage services with dedicated online application center
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Indiana and Illinois only
No indication of competitive interest rates or fee structure on website
No mention of investment advisory services beyond basic trust management
Limited information about business loan or credit products available
best_for: Individuals and families in Terre Haute, Indiana seeking community banking with local branch relationships
Small to medium-sized businesses in Indiana and Illinois needing business checking and banking services
Homebuyers in the service area looking for mortgage financing with local loan origination
Individuals interested in trust, estate planning, and wealth management services
diagnosis: THSB is best for individuals and businesses within its Indiana and Illinois service footprint seeking traditional community banking with physical branches, relationship-based service, and FDIC protection. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation—this bank does not serve customers outside its regional market, making it unavailable for most U.S. consumers.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
